hero.title: Equipment built and sourced for institutional reliability.
hero.description: PEIC-manufactured sterilization systems from Mumbai, supported by partner medical technologies from global and Indian brands. Specified, installed, and supported by one technical team.

manufacturing.title: PEIC Sterilization Systems
manufacturing.description: Engineered and assembled at PEIC's Shamroz Industrial Estate facility cluster in Goregaon West, with direct OEM accountability from pressure vessel to commissioning.
manufacturing.advantages_subtitle: Sterilization equipment is not treated as a commodity purchase. PEIC keeps engineering, spares, documentation, and service ownership close to the source.

advantages.title: In-House Engineering
advantages.description: Design, production, inspection, and service feedback handled through PEIC's Mumbai manufacturing base.

advantages.title: BIS-Certified Since 1976
advantages.description: IS 3829 Part 1 and Part 2 certification history across PEIC's primary sterilizer categories.

advantages.title: Localized Spare Parts
advantages.description: Critical spares for PEIC-manufactured systems stocked domestically to reduce avoidable downtime.

advantages.title: MSME & NSIC Registered
advantages.description: MSME and NSIC registration support where applicable, with eligibility reviewed against each procurement requirement.

partners.title: Global & Domestic Partner Technologies
partners.description: Current associations with medical equipment brands across oncology, OT, imaging, dental, neonatal care, and specialty departments.
partners.advantages_subtitle: Specification support, installation, training, service coordination, and documentation through one PEIC relationship.

advantages.title: Technical Integration
advantages.description: Installation, calibration, application training, and validation support where required by the equipment type.

advantages.title: Unified Service Relationship
advantages.description: Coordinated AMC/CMC planning across PEIC-manufactured and supported partner equipment.

advantages.title: Pan-India Coordination
advantages.description: Service dispatch, technical queries, and parts coordination through PEIC engineers and partner engineer networks.

advantages.title: Single-Point Procurement
advantages.description: One PEIC contact manages specifications, quotations, and delivery coordination across represented categories.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal Cylindrical / Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: High-capacity autoclaves for CSSD departments, engineered for continuous sterilization loads with controlled temperature and pressure performance. Available in horizontal cylindrical and rectangular configurations.

manufactured_products.name: High-Speed 'Flash' Steam Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Rapid-cycle sterilizers for OT instrument turnaround between procedures, designed to reduce inter-procedure delays while supporting sterilization assurance.

manufactured_products.name: Vertical Autoclaves
manufactured_products.description: Space-efficient vertical sterilizers for laboratories, clinics, and smaller CSSD units where dependable sterilization is needed within a compact footprint.

manufactured_products.name: Bedpan / Bowl & Utensil Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Dedicated systems for patient-care utensils in ward and ICU environments, supporting infection-control workflows outside the main CSSD.

manufactured_products.name: Hot & Cold-Water Pressure Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Pressure sterilization systems using hot and cold-water cycles for specialized medical, laboratory, and pharma-adjacent requirements.

manufactured_products.name: Bio Medical Waste Sanitizers
manufactured_products.description: On-site biomedical waste sanitization systems for healthcare facilities that need controlled treatment workflows before disposal.

manufactured_products.name: Tabletop Sterilization Units
manufactured_products.description: Compact bench-top autoclaves for dental clinics, outpatient procedure rooms, and smaller facilities with limited floor space.

manufactured_products.name: CSSD Furniture & Equipment Trolleys
manufactured_products.description: Stainless-steel workstations, instrument trolleys, and sterile storage infrastructure configured for CSSD workflow and infection-control zoning.

partner_companies.name: AngioDynamics
partner_companies.description: Ablation and interventional oncology systems for locoregional cancer treatment, including RFA, microwave ablation, and NanoKnife IRE.

partner_companies.name: Steris Corporation
partner_companies.description: Operating theatre and sterile processing technologies for surgical and CSSD infrastructure planning.

partner_companies.name: Dentsply Sirona
partner_companies.description: Dental operatory systems and cone-beam CT imaging for clinical dental infrastructure.

partner_companies.name: Samsung Electronics
partner_companies.description: Diagnostic imaging and portable radiography technologies for hospital and imaging-center requirements.

partner_companies.name: Richard Wolf GmbH
partner_companies.description: Rigid and flexible endoscopic systems for surgical and diagnostic departments.

partner_companies.name: Pentax Corporation
partner_companies.description: Gastrointestinal endoscopy and endoscopic ultrasound systems for gastroenterology and hepatobiliary departments.

partner_companies.name: BOWA Medical
partner_companies.description: Electrosurgical generators and energy platforms for operating theatre applications.

partner_companies.name: ATMOS MedizinTechnik
partner_companies.description: Surgical suction, smoke evacuation, and ENT-focused suction solutions for procedure environments.

partner_companies.name: INTRASENSE
partner_companies.description: MYRIAN medical imaging software for radiology, oncology, and advanced post-processing workflows.

partner_companies.name: Designs for Vision
partner_companies.description: Surgical illumination and autofluorescence wound-imaging systems for surgical and wound-care settings.

partner_companies.name: Confident Dental Equipment
partner_companies.description: Dental chairs, delivery systems, and operatory suites from an established Indian dental equipment manufacturer.

partner_companies.name: Neuro Equilibrium Diagnostics
partner_companies.description: Vestibular diagnostic and rehabilitation technology for ENT and neurology departments.

partner_companies.name: Simtek Medico Systems
partner_companies.description: Infusion management and NST systems for labour ward, neonatal, and monitoring environments.

partner_companies.name: Bird Meditech
partner_companies.description: Neonatal care equipment including radiant warmers and LED phototherapy systems.

partner_companies.name: Alan Electronic Systems
partner_companies.description: High-frequency electrosurgical generators and OT lighting for surgical theatre infrastructure.

partner_companies.name: Palakkad Surgical Industries & Technomed
partner_companies.description: Electrically operated and electro-hydraulic surgical tables for general and specialty operating theatres.

cta.label: Product Support
cta.title: Need specifications, a quotation, or a technical recommendation?
cta.description: Tell us the department, quantity, city, and intended use. PEIC will respond with relevant specifications and procurement guidance.
